home.heroSubtitle: Fresh tea, milk tea, lemon tea, snow cap, and warm desserts with a clean, gentle aroma.
home.heroFeatureItems: Bamboo Oolong · Osmanthus Oolong · Glutinous Fragrant Lemon
home.menuSubtitle: From creamy milk tea to bright lemon tea, each cup is made to let the tea aroma lead.

groups.name: Fresh Milk Tea
groups.description: Milk tea based on oolong, jasmine green, ceylon black, and roasted fragrant yellow tea.
groups.items: Bamboo Oolong Milk Tea, Osmanthus Oolong Milk Tea, Glutinous Fragrant Milk Tea, Jasmine Green Milk Tea, Ceylon Black Milk Tea, Roasted Fragrant Yellow Milk Tea

groups.name: Fresh Tea
groups.description: Milk-free tea with floral, roasted, and grain aroma profiles.
groups.price: Regular from IDR 32k · Large from IDR 42k
groups.items: Bamboo Oolong Tea, Osmanthus Oolong Tea, Jasmine Green Tea, Ceylon Black Tea, Roasted Fragrant Yellow Tea, Glutinous Fragrant Tea, Buckwheat Biluochun Tea

groups.name: Lemon Fresh Tea
groups.description: Fresh tea with lemon for a lighter, brighter cup.
groups.items: Glutinous Fragrant Lemon Tea, Bamboo Oolong Lemon Tea, Osmanthus Oolong Lemon Tea, Roasted Fragrant Yellow Lemon Tea, Jasmine Green Lemon Tea, Buckwheat Biluochun Lemon Tea

groups.name: Snow Cap Milk Tea
groups.description: Milk tea finished with a soft snow cap layer.
groups.items: Bamboo Oolong Snow Cap Milk Tea, Osmanthus Oolong Snow Cap Milk Tea

groups.name: Dessert
groups.description: Tea companions for dine-in and take away.

Normal ice / Less ice / No ice
home.locationSubtitle: Aroadri Tea currently serves from Malioboro Mall and Plaza Malioboro, Yogyakarta.

menu.title: Aroadri Tea Menu
menu.subtitle: Prices follow Regular/Large and Hot/Cold variants. Sugar, ice, and topping options are available when ordering.
menu.sugarIce: Normal sugar, less sugar, no sugar · normal ice, less ice, no ice
menu.toppings: Cheese Pearl, Oat Pearl, Crystal Pearl, Barley Pearl

about.title: Tea aroma, mountain character
about.body: Aroadri comes from Aroma and Adri, a Sanskrit word meaning mountain. The identity meets the visual language of shanshui: mountain, cloud, and water as symbols of calm, purity, and craft.

pillars.title: Nature Aroma
pillars.desc: Each drink is designed to carry a clean, gentle tea aroma.

pillars.title: Adri
pillars.desc: Adri means mountain, the inspiration behind the logo, store atmosphere, and calm character.

pillars.title: Modern Chinese Tea
pillars.desc: Oolong, jasmine green, ceylon black, roasted yellow, and biluochun are served in a modern format.

locations.title: Aroadri Tea Locations
locations.subtitle: Two active outlets in the Malioboro area, Yogyakarta.
locations.empty: No active outlet is available yet.

footer.company: PT. Gandha Hill Catering Management Indonesia

member.title: My Account
member.cashierLookupTitle: Use your phone number at checkout
member.cashierLookupBody: When the cashier asks whether you are a member, mention your registered phone number. The cashier will find the member record and confirm the name before points are recorded.

signup.title: Join Member
signup.subtitle: Use the same phone number when ordering in store so the cashier can find your member account.
signup.name: Full name

otp.title: Verify Email
otp.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to your email.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: By registering as an Aroadri Tea member, you agree to the terms below.

sections.title: Membership
sections.body: Membership is used to record customer identity, points, vouchers, and transaction history linked to the registered phone number.

sections.title: In-store Use
sections.body: During checkout, the cashier may ask for your phone number and confirm the member name before recording points or benefits.

sections.title: Points and Vouchers
sections.body: Points, tiers, and vouchers may change according to Aroadri Tea programs. Misuse of an account may cause benefits to be cancelled.

sections.title: Service Updates
sections.body: Aroadri Tea may update these terms to reflect operational, promotional, or legal requirements.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We protect member personal data with care and use it only for relevant operational needs.

sections.title: Data We Collect
sections.body: Member data may include name, email, phone number, birth date, city, points history, vouchers, and transaction history.

sections.title: How We Use Data
sections.body: Data is used for member verification, point recording, customer service, transaction audit, and account-related communication.

sections.title: Data Protection
sections.body: Data access is limited to operational needs. The system uses authentication, audit logs, and data safeguards according to the ERP design.

sections.title: Member Rights
sections.body: Members may request correction or account deletion through official Aroadri Tea channels, as long as it does not conflict with bookkeeping and legal obligations.
